recalls.Description: MPINOI adult portable bed rails have been recalled due to serious safety concerns. These white metal bed rails measure approximately 15 inches in width and 26 inches in height, featuring an extendable handle with gray padding and a black mesh pocket. The brand name "MPINOI" is displayed on the mesh pocket. The product poses a significant risk of entrapment and potential asphyxiation, as users can become trapped between the bed rail and the mattress, and the rails lack necessary hazard warning labels.
recalls.Title: Recall of MPINOI Adult Portable Bed Rails Due to Entrapment and Asphyxiation Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, please email MPINOIproductrecall@outlook.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled MPINOI Bed Rail
MPINOI is printed on the mesh pocket of the recalled bed rail

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com from December 2025 to February 2026, priced around $30.

Importers.Name: Guangzhou Aoran Trading Co., Ltd., dba Bioenrrty, of China

Hazards.Name: Entrapment and asphyxiation risks due to non-compliance with safety standards.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the bed rails immediately and contact Bioenrrty for a full refund. Destroy the rails by cutting the safety strap and marking them as "RECALLED". Email a photo of the destroyed rails to MPINOIproductrecall@outlook.com.

recalls.metaDescription: MPINOI Adult Portable Bed Rails recalled due to serious entrapment risks. Contact for refund and safety instructions.

recalls.Description: Vive Health is recalling its Compact Bed Rail (model LVA2009SLV) and Bed Rail Collection V (model LVA2097SLV), along with certain units of the Bed Rail model LVA1024 purchased before August 21, 2023. Previously, units of model LVA1024 sold after August 21, 2023, were recalled on February 19, 2026. These bed rails feature silver or white metal tubing and a black foam rubber grip handle, but may lack specific model numbers or brand labels.
recalls.Title: Vive Health Recalls Bed Rails Due to Serious Entrapment and Asphyxiation Risks; Two Fatalities Reported
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Vive Health at 800-487-3808 from 9 a.m. to 9 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, email recalls@vivehealth.com, or visit vivehealth.com/pages/recalls for further details.

Images.Caption: Recalled Vive Health Compact Bed Rail (model number LVA2009SLV)
Recalled Vive Health Bed Rail Collection V (model number LVA2097SLV)
Recalled Vive Health Compact Bed Rail (model number LVA1024)

Injuries.Name: Vive Health has received two reports of entrapment deaths associated with one model of the recalled bed rails. The deaths occurred in September 2024 and involved a 97-year-old man at an assisted living facility in Texas and a 93-year-old man at his home in Florida.

Retailers.Name: Vive Health sold approximately 122,000 units of the recalled bed rails through medical supply stores nationwide, as well as online at vivehealth.com, Amazon, and other medical supply websites. The bed rails were available for purchase from September 2019 to December 2025, priced between $45 and $90.

Importers.Name: Vive Health LLC, of Naples, Florida

Hazards.Name: Entrapment and asphyxiation risks when bed rails are attached to a bed.

Remedies.Name: Immediately cease use of the recalled bed rails and contact Vive Health for a full refund. Mark the bed rails as 'RECALLED' with a permanent marker, take a photo with the buyer's name, and email it to recalls@vivehealth.com. Dispose of the product according to local waste disposal regulations.

recalls.metaDescription: Vive Health recalls bed rails due to serious entrapment risks. Learn more about the recall and how to get a refund.

recalls.Description: Vive Health is recalling two models of adult portable bed rails, specifically the LVA1024 and LVA3031BLK. The LVA1024 features a white frame with a black handle, measuring 20 inches wide and 32 inches tall, while the LVA3031BLK has a black frame with a black handle, measuring 13 inches wide and 18 inches tall. These bed rails pose serious safety hazards, including risks of entrapment and asphyxiation.
recalls.Title: Vive Health Recalls Adult Portable Bed Rails Due to Entrapment and Asphyxiation Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach out to Vive Health at 800-487-3808 from 9 a.m. to 9 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, email recalls@vivehealth.com, or visit vivehealth.com/pages/recalls for further details.

Products.Name: Vive Health Bed Rail Model LVA1024

Remedies.Name: Stop using the bed rails, contact Vive Health for a full refund, mark the bed rails as 'RECALLED', and dispose of them properly.

recalls.Description: Beloems has issued a recall for their adult portable bed rails, specifically model BL-BR201. These foldable bed rails feature white metal tubing and are equipped with rounded black or gray foam rubber grips, support legs, and a fabric pouch. The brand logo is displayed on the fabric cover, with the model number found in the owner's manual. The recalled product poses significant safety hazards due to potential entrapment and asphyxiation risks.
recalls.Title: Beloems Adult Portable Bed Rails Recalled Due to Serious Injury Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should reach out to Beloems via email at leioujiapin@163.com for assistance.

Images.Caption: Recalled Beloems Adult Portable Bed Rail – black handles
Recalled Beloems Adult Portable Bed Rail – gray handles

Manufacturers.Name: Leioujiapin Technology Co., Ltd. dba Beloems, of China

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com from June 2025 to October 2025 for approximately $90.

Hazards.Name: Entrapment and asphyxiation risks due to structural instability, improper sizing of push pins, and potential for lacerations.

Remedies.Name: Consumers must cease use immediately and contact Beloems for a full refund. Destroy the bed rails by cutting the foam padding and marking them as 'RECALLED' with a permanent marker, then send a photo of the destroyed product to leioujiapin@163.com.

recalls.metaDescription: Beloems recalls adult portable bed rails due to serious safety risks, urging consumers to stop use and seek refunds.

recalls.Description: Fortemotus is recalling its adult portable bed rails, model USFTMTJAS008, which feature black tubing and foam rubber handle grips. These bed rails measure approximately 30 inches in width and height and include support legs and a fabric pouch. The Fortemotus logo is displayed on the fabric cover, and the model number can be found in the owner's manual. The product poses serious safety risks, including potential entrapment and asphyxiation.
recalls.Title: Fortemotus Adult Portable Bed Rails Recalled Due to Entrapment and Asphyxiation Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers should reach out to Fortemotus Direct US via email at fortemotusofficial@outlook.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled Fortemotus Adult Portable Bed Rail

Manufacturers.Name: Guangzhou Kezhinuo Maoyi Youxian Gongsi, dba Fortemotus Direct US, of China

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com from August 2025 to October 2025 for approximately $100.

Hazards.Name: Entrapment and asphyxiation risks due to structural instability and improperly sized components, leading to potential falls and lacerations.

Remedies.Name: Consumers must stop using the recalled bed rails immediately and contact Fortemotus Direct US for a full refund. They should destroy the bed rails by cutting the foam padding and send a photo of the destroyed product to fortemotusofficial@outlook.com.

recalls.metaDescription: Fortemotus recalls adult portable bed rails due to serious safety hazards. Stop using immediately and contact for a refund.

recalls.Description: YOLAAH is recalling its Portable Bed Rails, model BR-01, due to serious safety concerns. These bed rails, featuring a black rubber hand grip and a storage pocket, measure 15.8 inches in height and 26.8 inches in width. The product is identifiable by the 'YOLAAH' label on the storage pocket. The bed rails do not meet mandatory safety standards, creating significant risks of entrapment and asphyxiation for users.
recalls.Title: YOLAAH Adult Portable Bed Rails Recalled Due to Entrapment and Asphyxiation Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, email YOLAAH at yolaahproductrecall@outlook.com.

Recalled YOLAAH Bed Rail (top view)

Distributors.Name: Guangzhou Aowei Technology Co., Ltd. dba Yolaah, of China

Hazards.Name: Entrapment and asphyxiation risks due to non-compliance with safety standards.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the bed rails, cut the fabric mesh and safety strap, mark the rails as 'RECALLED', and email a photo to YOLAAH.

recalls.metaDescription: YOLAAH recalls Portable Bed Rails due to serious entrapment and asphyxiation risks. Learn how to return the product safely.

recalls.Description: Sangohe is recalling its adult portable bed rails due to serious safety concerns. These black, trapezoidal bed rails measure approximately 22.4 inches in width and 32 inches in height, featuring an extendable handle with gray padding and a mesh storage pocket. The model number 'KDB504A01FT' can be found on a label on the frame, either on the bottom foot tube or the horizontal cross tube, and the brand name 'Sangohe' is displayed on the packaging.
recalls.Title: Sangohe Adult Portable Bed Rails Recalled Due to Entrapment and Asphyxiation Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further details, contact Sangohe via email at SGHproductrecall@163.com or visit their website at https://commodechair.com/ and select 'Recall' at the top.

recalls.Description: Agrish has issued a recall for its adult portable bed rails, specifically models 2512, 2513, and 2516. These bed rails, designed for adult beds, feature white tubing and rounded gray foam rubber grips. Certain models come with additional features such as a gray fabric pouch, support legs, and a motion-sensor light. The dimensions of the recalled models vary, with model 2512 measuring approximately 11 inches wide by 39 inches high, model 2513 at 12 inches wide by 42 inches high, and model 2516 at 37 inches wide by 45 inches high.
recalls.Title: Recall of Agrish Adult Portable Bed Rails Due to Entrapment and Asphyxiation Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further assistance, consumers can reach Agrish Direct at 800-613-5998 from 10 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, or via email at agrish.us@outlook.com. Additional information is available online at http://www.agrish.online/recall or by visiting www.agrish.online and selecting 'More' followed by 'Recall' at the top of the page.

Hazards.Name: Entrapment and asphyxiation risks due to violation of mandatory safety standards.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the recalled bed rails immediately and contact Agrish Direct for a full refund. Visit http://www.agrish.online/recall to register for the recall and get disposal instructions.

recalls.metaDescription: Agrish recalls adult portable bed rails due to serious entrapment and asphyxiation hazards. Learn how to get a refund and dispose of the product safely.

recalls.Description: JOKOSIS is recalling its Portable Bed Rails, model HC0262, due to serious safety hazards. These black bed rails, which feature a zippered storage pouch, measure 31.5 inches in height and 40.6 inches in width. The model number HC0262 is printed on the packaging, indicating the specific product involved in this recall. Users face entrapment risks that could lead to asphyxiation, as the rails do not meet mandatory safety standards and lack the necessary hazard warning labels.
recalls.Title: Recall of JOKOSIS Adult Portable Bed Rails Due to Entrapment and Asphyxiation Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should stop using the recalled bed rails immediately and contact JOKOSIS at jokosisbedrailrecall@outlook.com for a refund. They are advised to mark the bed rails with "RECALLED" using a permanent marker, take a photo of the marked rails, and send it to the provided email address before disposing of the product according to local regulations.

Distributors.Name: Guangshui Xie Lan Zheng Trading Co., Ltd., dba JOKOSIS, of China

Hazards.Name: Entrapment and asphyxiation risks due to non-compliance with safety standards

Remedies.Name: Stop using the product, mark it as recalled, and contact for a refund

recalls.metaDescription: JOKOSIS recalls Portable Bed Rails due to serious entrapment and asphyxiation hazards. Immediate action required for safety.

recalls.Description: KingPavonini has issued a recall for six models of their adult portable bed rails due to serious safety concerns. These bed rails, which may entrap users or cause asphyxiation, do not meet mandatory safety standards. The models affected include BC-CBJ-X, BC-CBJ, BC-LDFS-X, LDFS-SSK, 04-BC-LDFS, and BC-LDFS, identifiable by their white or black tubing and black foam rubber handle grips. Some models also feature support legs and motion-sensor lights.
recalls.Title: Recall of KingPavonini Adult Portable Bed Rails Due to Entrapment and Asphyxiation Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, consumers can reach KingPavonini at 888-281-8150 from 9 a.m. to 4 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, or email service@kingpavonini.com. Additional details are available online at https://www.kingpavonini.com.cn by clicking on "Recall" at the top of the page.

Hazards.Name: Risk of entrapment and asphyxiation due to non-compliance with safety standards.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease use immediately and contact KingPavonini for a refund or replacement. Follow the outlined disposal steps to safely discard the recalled bed rails.

recalls.metaDescription: KingPavonini recalls adult portable bed rails due to serious safety hazards. Learn how to return or dispose of affected products safely.

recalls.Description: WYBITNY has issued a recall for its children's bed rails due to a serious risk of entrapment that could lead to injury or death. These portable bed rails feature a white metal frame and dark gray fabric cushions filled with foam. The product is labeled with the brand name and model number "BGRT003" on the fabric cushions. The design does not meet the mandatory safety standards for children's portable bed rails, creating openings that can trap a child when the rails are installed next to a bed.
recalls.Title: WYBITNY Children's Bed Rails Recalled Due to Entrapment Hazard; Sold on Amazon
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact WYBITNY via email at servicewybitny@outlook.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled WYBITNY Children’s Portable Bed Rails
"WYBITNY" and "BGRT003" are printed on a label located on the fabric cushions

Manufacturers.Name: Shanghai Siwu Jidan Shangmao Youxian Gongsi, dbaWYBITNY, of China

Retailers.Name: Available on Amazon from June 2025 to July 2025 for approximately $70.

Hazards.Name: Entrapment risk due to openings in the bed rails

Remedies.Name: Stop using the bed rails and request a full refund from WYBITNY. Send a photo of the bed rails labeled "Recalled" to servicewybitny@outlook.com and dispose of the product following local waste guidelines.

recalls.metaDescription: WYBITNY recalls children's bed rails due to serious entrapment risks. Contact for refunds and safety instructions.

recalls.Description: Neaude has issued a recall for its adult portable bed rails, model BR0221SL001, which were designed for use on adult beds. These bed rails feature a silver top rail with matching support columns, blue accents, a red handle button, and a faux wood design with white accents. The rails measure approximately 37 inches in width and 14 inches in height, and they can be folded or unfolded by pressing the red button.
recalls.Title: Recall of Neaude Adult Portable Bed Rails Due to Serious Entrapment and Asphyxiation Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more details, consumers can reach Neaude via email at ruiye1234@outlook.com or visit their website at https://neaudehealth.com/products/neaude-adult-portable-bed-rails. To register for a refund, click on "Free Refund - Register Here" at the top of the page.

Images.Caption: Recalled Neaude Adult Portable Bed Rail with silver top rail – top view
Recalled Neaude Adult Portable Bed Rail with silver top rail – front view
Recalled Neaude Adult Portable Bed Rail with faux wood top rail – front view
Recalled Neaude Adult Portable Bed Rail with faux wood top rail – top view

Retailers.Name: Available on Amazon from August 2023 until March 2025, priced between $55 and $65.

Hazards.Name: The bed rails do not meet mandatory safety standards, creating a significant risk of entrapment and potential asphyxiation. Users may become trapped within the bed rail or between the rail and the mattress. Additionally, these rails lack the necessary warning labels.

Remedies.Name: Consumers are advised to stop using the recalled bed rails immediately and contact Neaude for a full refund. They should mark the upper and lower rails with 'RECALLED' using a permanent marker, write 'Bought on or after August 21, 2023' on a piece of paper, take a photo of this alongside the marked rails, and email the photo to ruiye1234@outlook.com. Finally, dispose of the product according to local waste disposal regulations.

recalls.metaDescription: Neaude recalls adult portable bed rails due to serious entrapment and asphyxiation risks. Learn how to get a refund.

recalls.Description: HOMEAL is recalling its children's bed rails due to a serious risk of injury or death from entrapment. These portable bed rails feature a white steel frame and gray oxford cloth, with the brand name 'HOMEAL' displayed on the fabric and 'Model No.: 338' labeled on the product. The design does not meet mandatory safety standards, allowing for potential entrapment when positioned next to a bed.
recalls.Title: Recall of HOMEAL Children's Bed Rails Due to Entrapment Hazard
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should reach out to HOMEAL via email at homeal_recalls@outlook.com for assistance.

Distributors.Name: Shenzhen Speeding Culture Communication Co. Ltd., dba HOMEAL, of China

Hazards.Name: Entrapment risk leading to serious injury or death

Remedies.Name: Stop using the bed rails, contact HOMEAL for a refund, destroy the cloth covering, and dispose of the product properly.

recalls.metaDescription: HOMEAL recalls children's bed rails due to a serious entrapment hazard. Contact for refunds and safety instructions.

The product fails to meet mandatory safety standards, posing a risk of entrapment and potential asphyxiation for users.

recalls.Description: WeHwupe has issued a recall for their adult portable bed rails, specifically models BRX-8002 and BRX-8003, which were sold for use on adult beds. These bed rails lack model number labels, but you can find the model numbers on the assembly instructions if you have them. The rails are constructed from white metal tubing and feature a rounded gray foam rubber grip handle along with a fabric pouch. Model BRX-8002 measures 22 inches wide with an adjustable height of 18.8 to 21.5 inches, while model BRX-8003 has two support legs, measures 23.6 inches wide, and adjusts between 20.2 to 22.6 inches in height.
recalls.Title: WeHwupe Adult Portable Bed Rails Recalled Due to Entrapment and Asphyxiation Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact WeHwupe Store at 888-438-3220 from 9 a.m. to 4 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, or email wehwupestore@163.com. More information is available online at https://chunqushop.com/wehwupe-bed-rail-safety-recall/ or by visiting https://chunqushop.com and selecting 'Product Recall' at the top.

recalls.Description: The LivingCaring adult portable bed rails are being recalled due to significant safety concerns, including the risk of serious injury or death from entrapment and asphyxiation. These bed rails feature a foldable design made of white metal with black foam padding on the grip handle. They are adjustable in width from approximately 29 to 41 inches and in height from about 30 to 37 inches, and include a storage bag and a magnetic motion sensor light.
recalls.Title: Recall of LivingCaring Adult Portable Bed Rails Due to Serious Entrapment and Asphyxiation Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further information, consumers can contact Shanghai Kai Rong Xin Xi Ke Ji via email at Jerryhe@sourcing-cn.com.

Importers.Name: Shanghai Kai Rong Xin Xi Ke Ji Co. Ltd., of China

Hazards.Name: Serious entrapment hazard and risk of asphyxiation due to non-compliance with federal regulations.

Remedies.Name: Consumers must stop using the recalled bed rails immediately. To obtain a refund, send a photo of the disposed bed rail or an Amazon purchase receipt via email to Jerryhe@sourcing-cn.com. The recalling company and Amazon will reach out to known purchasers.

recalls.metaDescription: LivingCaring recalls adult portable bed rails due to serious safety hazards. Learn how to get a refund and stay safe.

recalls.Description: Medical King is recalling its Bed Assist Rails due to serious safety concerns. This recall includes the Bed Assist Rail with Adjustable Heights (models 7007 and 7057) and the Bed Assist Rail Without Legs (model 7037). The adjustable model features black or white metal tubing with a rounded black foam rubber grip handle and a fabric pouch, while the model without legs is made of silver metal tubing with a black foam rubber grip handle and a black fabric pouch. Notably, these bed rails do not have model numbers or specific brand labels.
recalls.Title: Medical King Recalls 222,000 Adult Bed Rails Due to Entrapment and Asphyxia Risks; One Fatality Reported
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Medical King at their toll-free number 888-715-2630, available from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday. More information can also be found online at https://medicalkingusa.com/products/recalls or by visiting https://medicalkingusa.com and selecting 'Product Recalls' from the top menu.

Products.Name: Bed Assist Rail with Adjustable Heights

Images.Caption: Recalled Bed Assist Rail with Adjustable Heights (model 7007)
Recalled Bed Assist Rail with Adjustable Heights (model 7057)
Recalled Bed Assist Rail Without Legs (model 7037)

Injuries.Name: Medical King has received one report of a death involving the Bed Assist Rail with Adjustable Heights, model number 7007. In November 2023, at a residential care facility in South Carolina, a 66-year-old man died after becoming entrapped between his mattress and the bed rail.

Retailers.Name: These bed rails were sold online at Amazon.com, Walmart.com, Target Plus, eBay, Kohls.com, and medicalkingusa.com from January 2020 through March 2024 for approximately $40.

Importers.Name: Home 4U, Inc., dba. Medical King, of Brooklyn, New York

Hazards.Name: Entrapment and asphyxiation risk when users become trapped between the bed rail and mattress.

Remedies.Name: Free repair kit or replacement bed rail upon contacting Medical King.

recalls.metaDescription: Medical King recalls 222,000 adult bed rails due to serious safety hazards, including entrapment risks. Learn more about the recall.

recalls.Description: Ceither Adult Portable Bed Rails, designed for adult beds, are being recalled due to significant safety concerns. These black metal and foam bed rails, measuring approximately 12-1/2 inches wide and adjustable from 30 to 42 inches in height, pose serious entrapment hazards that could lead to asphyxiation. This recall affects only those bed rails purchased on or after August 21, 2023.
recalls.Title: Ceither Adult Portable Bed Rails Recalled Due to Entrapment and Asphyxia Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further details, contact Inforce at xchan524@outlook.com or visit their storefront on Amazon.com.

Hazards.Name: Entrapment and asphyxiation risks due to violation of federal safety regulations.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease using the recalled bed rails immediately. To obtain a refund, send a photo of the disposed bed rail and proof of purchase to xchan524@outlook.com. Refunds are available only for products purchased after August 21, 2023.

recalls.metaDescription: Ceither Adult Portable Bed Rails recalled due to serious safety hazards. Immediate action required for refund.

recalls.Description: Medline Industries is recalling its adult portable bed rails, identified by model numbers MDS6800BA and MDS6800BAH. While both models are the same, MDS6800BA was sold individually, whereas MDS6800BAH was packaged in sets of three. These bed rails feature black metal tubing, a rounded black foam rubber grip handle, and a fabric pouch, with the Medline name and model number labeled on the support frame near the vertical section of the rail.
recalls.Title: Medline Industries Recalls 1.5 Million Adult Bed Rails Due to Entrapment and Asphyxiation Risks; Two Fatal Incidents Reported
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Medline at 866-359-1704 from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, via email at recalls@medline.com, or visit https://recalls.medline.com or https://athome.medline.com and select "Product Recalls" at the bottom of the page for further details.

Products.Name: Medline Adult Portable Bed Rails
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 1.5 million (In addition, about 5,522 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled Bed Assist Bar (shown with retention strap included with product)
Location of label printed with model number
Model number printed next to the letters "REF" on the label

Injuries.Name: Medline has received two reports of entrapment deaths associated with the Bed Assist Bars. The deaths occurred in July 2019 and November 2023 and involved a 76-year-old woman at a senior nursing facility in Iowa and an 87-year-old woman at a residential care facility in South Carolina.

Retailers.Name: Available through Medline's websites, Medline.com and athome.medline.com, as well as major online retailers such as Amazon and Walmart.com, online pharmacies like CVS.com and Walgreens.com, and various online medical supply stores including Cascade Healthcare Solutions and Magic Medical, from July 2009 until March 2024, priced between $32 and $64.

Importers.Name: Medline Industries LP, of Northfield, Illinois

Hazards.Name: Entrapment and asphyxiation risk

Remedies.Name: Stop using the bed rails and contact Medline for a full refund.

recalls.metaDescription: Medline recalls 1.5 million adult bed rails due to serious safety hazards, including entrapment risks. Two deaths reported.

recalls.Description: Essential Medical Supply has announced a recall of several models of adult portable bed rails due to significant safety hazards. The affected products include the Hand Bed Rail (model P1410), Hand Bed Rail with Pouch (model P1410-P), Hand Bed Rail with Floor Support (model P1411), and Hand Bed Rail with Floor Support with Pouch (model P1411-P). These rails, identifiable by the brand name and model number on the grip handle label, are constructed from chrome or white metal tubing and feature black padding. They stand approximately 17 to 21 inches high and 20 inches wide, with only models lacking an 'R' at the end of their designation being part of this recall.
recalls.Title: Essential Medical Supply Recalls Adult Portable Bed Rails Due to Serious Entrapment and Asphyxia Risks; Additional Fatalities Reported
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further information, consumers can reach out to Essential Medical Supply at 800-826-8423 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or visit essentialmedicalsupply.com and select 'Important Safety Notice' at the top of the page. More details can also be found at https://www.essentialmedicalsupply.com/important-safety-information.

Images.Caption: Recalled Essential Medical Supply Endurance® Hand Bed Rail (P1410)
Recalled Essential Medical Supply Endurance® Hand Bed Rail with Pouch (P1410-P)
Recalled Essential Medical Supply Endurance® Hand Bed Rail with Floor Support (P1411)
Recalled Essential Medical Supply Endurance® Hand Bed Rail with Floor Support with Pouch (P1411-P)

Injuries.Name: In December 2022, an 86-year-old man died at an assisted living facility in Connecticut, and in August 2023, a 99-year-old man died at his home in California. CPSC previously announced the recall on December 22, 2021, following the entrapment death of an 86-year-old man in California. He died at his home in December 2012, reportedly from the Endurance Hand Bed Rail (model P1410).

Retailers.Name: Available at medical supply stores across the country and online through www.amazon.com and www.walmart.com. The bed rails were sold from October 2006 to December 2021, priced between $36 and $98.

Importers.Name: Essential Medical Supply Inc., of Orlando, Florida

Hazards.Name: Entrapment and asphyxiation risks when users become trapped between the bed rail and mattress.

Remedies.Name: Consumers are advised to cease use of the recalled bed rails immediately. Those who purchased the affected models after November 1, 2015, will be eligible for a pro-rated refund based on the product's age.

recalls.metaDescription: Essential Medical Supply recalls adult portable bed rails due to entrapment and asphyxia hazards, with additional fatalities reported.
